name: Do I need a lawyer for my work accident claim in Saint George?
description: Recommended for complications; boosts success rate.[2]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for my work accident claim in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Recommended for complications; boosts success rate.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Not required but strongly advised for denials, disputes, or third-party claims.[7] Context: Utah self-represented ok for simple cases but lawyers boost approvals.[2] Key factors: Complex causation like idiopathic falls needs expert help.[3] Practical guidance: Free consults common; contingency fee only if win. Avoid adjuster tricks. Representation increases payouts.
